# Gram Stain

**Summary**: A differential staining technique used to differentiate bacteria into two large groups based on cell wall composition.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-bello|Bello, 2015]] used Gram staining and biochemical tests to identify bacterial colonies involved in naphthalene degradation.

## Key Results and Findings

- Identified four distinct bacterial colonies including Enterobacter spp., Staphylococcus spp., Pseudomonas spp., and Bacillus spp. ([[2015-bello|Bello, 2015, p. 109]])
